# Need APEX eligibility check route

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## User intent The user asks whether they are eligible for APEX help. ## Best primary route

## When to surface

The user asks whether they are eligible for APEX help.

## Key information

- ## User intent
- The user asks whether they are eligible for APEX help.
- ## Best primary route
- Use UH APEX eligibility page. Main checks: physical address in service area, legally formed, for-profit, and ready to sell to government.
- ## Ask first
- What is your physical business ZIP and county?
- Is the business legally formed and for-profit?

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Program_Eligibility.asp>

## Next handoff

Use UH APEX eligibility page. Main checks: physical address in service area, legally formed, for-profit, and ready to sell to government.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
